description: Reads FASTA or FASTA.GZ files containing reference sequences, and writes them as a SAM file containing a sequence dictionary
author: GenePattern
plan:
## Picard.CreateSequenceDictionary GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Picard.CreateSequenceDictionary is a GenePattern module that Reads FASTA or FASTA.GZ files containing reference sequences, and writes them as a SAM file containing a sequence dictionary

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 6 parameters:
- Required: reference.sequence.file, output.file
- Optional: genome.assembly, uri, truncate.names.at.white.space, num.sequences

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>CreateSequenceDictionary.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-CreateSequenceDictionary.jar org.genepattern.sam.CreateSeqDictWrapper -r<reference.sequence.file> -g<genome.assembly> -u<uri> -t<truncate.names.at.white.space> -n<num.sequences> -o<output.file>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: genome.assembly
parameters.description: The genome assembly to put into AS field of sequence dictionary entry

parameters.name: uri
parameters.description: The uri to put into UR field of sequence dictionary entry

parameters.name: truncate.names.at.white.space
parameters.description: Make sequence name the first word from the > line in the reference file

parameters.name: num.sequences
parameters.description: Stop after writing this many sequences

parameters.name: output.file
parameters.description: The name of the output file
